nasb.text: Solomon answered all her questions; nothing was hidden from the king which he did not explain to her.

esv.text: And Solomon answered all her questions; there was nothing hidden from the king that he could not explain to her.

cnv.text: 所羅門把她所有的問題都給她解說明白，沒有一件事難倒王，使王不能回答她的。

ccb.text: 所罗门王解答了她所有的问题，没有一样难得住他。
